project_summary: Government eMarketplace e-Procurement System for Indian Railways E-Procurement (IREPS ID-1115264) involving catering stall lease at Kannur Railway Station under contract PGTCATG-CANPF23-002 for 5 years starting 07/03/2025 to 06/03/2030.

modules.name: Contract Management
modules.description: Handles contract agreement, start/end dates, payment schedules, and escalation clauses for the 5-year lease.

modules.name: Asset Management
modules.description: Manages details of the catering stall (Asset Code: Catg-PGT-CAN-SMU-160) at Kannur Railway Station, including site plans and special conditions.

modules.name: Financial Management
modules.description: Oversees payment schedules, advance payments, regular payments, grace periods, penalties, and commercial details like GST, escalation, and contract value.

modules.name: Bidder Documentation
modules.description: Manages bidder declarations, experience certificates, OBC/Women category documents, FSSAI, GST, PAN, Aadhaar, solvency certificates, and MSME proof.

modules.name: Compliance & Security
modules.description: Ensures adherence to standard contract conditions, security deposits (EMD), and punitive actions for false declarations or non-compliance.

tasks.title: Verify bidder documents for completeness and validity
tasks.description: Check all uploaded documents (GST, FSSAI, PAN, Aadhaar, OBC certificate, etc.) for authenticity and compliance with contract requirements.

tasks.title: Process advance payment of Rs. 344,431.75 by 26/02/2025
tasks.description: Ensure timely payment within 15 days of contract date to avoid penalties.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit site plan for catering stall No. 4
tasks.description: Obtain and validate the site plan for the leased asset as per special conditions.

tasks.title: Set up payment schedule for regular quarterly payments
tasks.description: Configure payment reminders and systems for 15-day advance payments before each quarter start date.

tasks.title: Monitor escalation clause applicability from year 4
tasks.description: Track contract start date and ensure escalation (10%) is applied to payments from 07/03/2028 onwards.

tasks.title: Conduct periodic compliance audits
tasks.description: Ensure ongoing adherence to FSSAI, GST, and other regulatory requirements during the lease period.

risks.risk: Delay in advance payment leading to penalty or contract termination
Non-compliance with FSSAI or other regulatory requirements during lease period
Discrepancies in bidder documents leading to disqualification or legal action
Escalation clause misapplication or disputes over payment adjustments
Asset damage or non-compliance with site conditions during lease
Changes in GST rates or tax laws affecting contract value
